articles.title: ‘Blissful ignorance’: Milken elite bask in glow of roaring markets
articles.body: Financiers at the Beverly Hills gathering brush aside concerns over Iran conflict and private market strains

articles.title: Oil hovers around $100 on hopes of US-Iran deal
articles.body: Tehran is reviewing a Washington-backed proposal that Donald Trump says could bring the conflict to an end

articles.title: Iran still reviewing new U.S. peace proposal as Trump predicts war will 'be over quickly': Reports
articles.body: Senior Iranian official Mohsen Rezaee reportedly said Tehran would not let the U.S. reopen the Strait of Hormuz with "an unrealistic plan."
